ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., New, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Special instructions or notes from the customer */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the order status */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., '10cm x 20cm x 5cm') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., L, M, S) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the color belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product (e.g., Orange, Process Red) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used (e.g., USPS, UPS) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "tracking_status" TEXT /* Current tracking status */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping carrier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES shipping_carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being tracked */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "status_update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last status update */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the order was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return */,
  "return_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the returned item */,
  "customer_comments" TEXT /* Customer comments regarding the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return being refunded */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was processed */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method of refund */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoicing" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being invoiced */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoicing_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_details" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping carrier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping carrier */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the shipping carrier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the shipping carrier */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the carrier's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
